patch.value: Add MCP protocol handshake tests (initialize + tools/list + unknown-tool error)
Integration tests only exercise tools/call; the initialize handshake and tools/list (the first client calls) are untested, so a protocol-version or TOOLS/HANDLERS mismatch would go undetected.
Tests assert initialize protocolVersion + capabilities.tools + serverInfo.name; tools/list returns the full tool set incl pm_run/pm_plan; unknown tools/call returns isError:true.
Integration tests only exercise tools/call; the initialize handshake and tools/list (the first client calls) are untested, so a protocol-version or TOOLS/HANDLERS mismatch would go undetected.
